info.name: Together In India - Complete Backend API v2
info.description: Rebuilt from current backend route files and registerRoutes mount map. Source of truth is codebase.

exec: try { const j = pm.response.json(); const t = j?.data?.accessToken; const r = j?.data?.refreshToken; const u = j?.data?.user?.id || j?.data?.user?._id; if (t) { pm.environment.set('accessToken', t); pm.environment.set('adminToken', t); pm.environment.set('vendorToken', t); } if (r) pm.environment.set('refreshToken', r); if (u) pm.environment.set('userId', u); } catch(e) {}

try { const j = pm.response.json(); const t = j?.data?.accessToken; const r = j?.data?.refreshToken; const u = j?.data?.user?.id || j?.data?.user?._id; if (t) { pm.environment.set('accessToken', t); pm.environment.set('adminToken', t); pm.environment.set('vendorToken', t); } if (r) pm.environment.set('refreshToken', r); if (u) pm.environment.set('userId', u); } catch(e) {}
